person.name: Adam de Everingham I
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Father-Robert de Everingham d. Jun 1246

Mother-Isabel de Birkin d. c 13 Jul 1252

Sir Adam de Everingham was born at Nottinghamshire, Everingham, Kipling Cotes, & Sherburn, Yorkshire. He married Isabel de Roos, daughter of Sir Robert de Roos, Chief Justice of the King's Bench, before May 1271.

Sir Adam de Everingham died on 8 December 1280.

«b»Family 1«/b»
Maude, the daughter of Sir John Monceaux of Barmston (1234-1270)

«b»Child«/b»
1.) Sir Robert de Everingham d. c 21 Jul 1287

«b»Family 2«/b»
Isabel de Roos d. c 7 May 1275

«b»Marriage«/b»
m. Isabel Monceaux (Father: John Monceaux, Lord of Barmston)

«b»Issue:«/b»
1.) Robert (heir; b.c. 1256)

«b»Death«/b»
A writ was sent to Richard de Holebrok, the king's steward, on 28 December 9 Edward I, after which Inquisitions were taken in Lincoln, York, and Nottingham, which found that his first born son and heir was Robert, aged 24. William le Mascy held land in Nottingham of Adam de Everingham.

A writ was sent to Thomas de Normanvile, the king's steward, having accepted the oath of Isabel, late the wife of the said Adam, not to marry without the king's licence, and made extent of the lands etc, to cause her reasonable dower to be assigned to her, 9 December, 9 Edward I.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Everingham I於大約1231年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Robert de Everingham I27歲，母親Isabel De Birkin23歲。他於1270年5月與Maude de Monceaux結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1280年12月8日在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Everingham I于大约1231年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Robert de Everingham I27岁，母亲Isabel De Birkin23岁。他于1270年5月与Maude de Monceaux结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1280年12月8日在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Everingham I was born about 1231, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Everingham I, was 27 and his mother, Isabel De Birkin, was 23. He married Maude de Monceaux in May 1270. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 8 December 1280, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam d’Everingham I est né environ 1231, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert d’Everingham I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Birkin, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Maude de Monceaux en mai 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1280, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Everingham I um 1231 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Everingham I 27 und seine Mutter Isabel De Birkin 23. Er hat im Mai 1270 Maude de Monceaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1280 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Everingham I è nato il circa 1231 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Everingham I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel De Birkin, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Maude de Monceaux nel maggio 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 8 dicembre 1280, nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Everingham Iが約1231年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Everingham Iは27歳，母Isabel De Birkinは23歳であった。1270年5月にMaude de Monceauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1280年12月8日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Everingham I(이)가 대략 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Everingham I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De Birkin(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1270년 5월 Maude de Monceaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1280년 12월 8일 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Everingham I nasceu aproximadamente 1231, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Everingham I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De Birkin, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude de Monceaux em maio de 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1280, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Everingham I родился около 1231 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Everingham I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Birkin, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude de Monceaux май 1270 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 8 декабря 1280 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Everingham I nació aproximadamente 1231, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Everingham I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel De Birkin, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Maude de Monceaux en mayo de 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1280, en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
